name: people-ops-hr
description: People Operations / HR team for SMBs — 3 agents (people-ops-generalist, talent-acquisition-lead, total-rewards-analyst) for the human side of a company: the employee lifecycle (onboarding to offboarding), handbook & policy authoring, HRIS data hygiene, employee-relations basics, leave/PTO, structured hiring (job ladders, interview kits, scorecards, funnel metrics, offers), and total rewards (compensation bands & ranges, leveling/job architecture, benefits-design overview, pay equity, merit/promotion cycles). NOT legal advice — flags employment-compliance basics (FLSA, at-will, EEO) for counsel rather than opining. Decision-tree knowledge bank (5 Mermaid trees), 12 best-practices, 3 skills, 3 commands, 2 templates, 1 hook, hr_calc.py calculator, scenarios. Distinct from staffing-operations (the agency business). Seams: agency ops -> staffing-operations; payroll/GL -> finance; benefits underwriting -> insurance-life-health-benefits. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
